Edge is graded against the de-vigged fair line. The label under Fair shows its source: Pinnacle = sharp no-vig (best), Consensus = median of your books, Raw = only one side quoted so no de-vig was possible (least reliable — treat the edge with caution). Informational and entertainment purposes only — not investment advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
